name: aws-icon
title: AWS Icons
description: Search the official AWS Architecture icon set and copy any icon as PNG or SVG.
author: etalocohc373

commands.name: copy-aws-icon
commands.title: Search AWS Icons
commands.description: Search and copy AWS Architecture icons as PNG or SVG.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
